svg.title: The DiceX platform ecosystem
svg.desc: Eight real DiceX products — AI Studio, Reseller, SMS, Social, Meetings, Short Links, Developers, Engage — with their product icons, sitting on the shared @dicex design system and platform libraries in one Nx and Bun monorepo.
svg.text: Formerly the PayamKotah SMS panel — now a multi-app product ecosystem in one Nx + Bun monorepo.

g.text: ui-v2 · api (Orval) · auth · i18n / RTL · ai · layout · captcha
